CheckTitle: Ensure sign-in risk policy is configured to block high and medium risk
Description: Verifies that at least one enabled Conditional Access policy responds to sign-in risk levels (high and/or medium) by requiring MFA or blocking access. Requires Entra ID P2 or Entra ID Governance.
Risk: Without sign-in risk policies, Entra ID cannot automatically respond to suspicious sign-in patterns such as impossible travel, anonymous IP addresses, or credential spray attacks detected by Identity Protection.

Remediation.Recommendation: Create a Conditional Access policy targeting All Users with sign-in risk levels set to High and Medium, requiring MFA or blocking access.
